text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm Mejiro Ardan. Henceforth, I will be under your
guidance.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I expect that the fragility of my body will prove
to be a source of some concern for you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Nevertheless, I shall face any obstacle head-on... to bring dazzling light to the here and now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
